title: External quality assessment for yaws elimination in low- and middle-income countries using plasmid-based proficiency test items
author: Müller, Claudia
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
External quality assessment for yaws elimination in low- and middle-income countries using plasmid-based proficiency test items  Claudia Müller1, Serges Tchatchouang2, Laud Anthony Basing3, Solange Ngazoa-Kakou4, Kouadio Aboh Hugues4,5, Becca Louise Handley6, Camila G. Beiras7,8, Ivy Amanor3, Philippe Ndzomo2, Mohammed A.
